name: Traditional Autos
description_short: Traditional Autos is a credit repair provider based in Dallas, Texas. Rated 4.6/5 with 794 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Traditional Autos is a credit repair provider serving clients in Dallas, Texas. With 794 Google reviews and a 4.6/5.0 rating, Traditional Autos has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a auto broker, auto repair shop, car dealer, Traditional Autos provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Dallas, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Traditional Autos operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Dallas, Texas area who are considering Traditional Autos should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

diagnosis: A highly-rated credit repair provider in Dallas, Texas with strong customer satisfaction. Best suited for consumers who prefer working with an established, well-reviewed local provider.
